child_spec.name: iter_0003_island2_regularize_hard
child_spec.reasoning_summary: transformer iter_0002 was the cautionary tale: train 0.697 vs val 0.398 (gap +0.179) at epoch 39 but best val hit at ep 2. Diagnosis: REGULARIZATION not capacity. Shrink + dropout up: d_model 64->48, num_heads 8->4, num_layers 3->2, dropout 0.1->0.3, epochs 40->15 (early stop equivalent).
